channel.title: 🎓 Philosophy on Jonas B. Skånøy
channel.description: Recent content in 🎓 Philosophy on Jonas B. Skånøy

item.title: Book review: Twilight of the Idols
item.description: In this post, I’ll review Nietzsche’s famous work Götzen-Dämmerung, better known as “Twilight of the Idols”. I will try, to the best of my abilities, to bring something new to the table with my take on this book and pick out the aphorisms and passages that I found fruitful and thought-provoking. So, without further ado, let’s begin! Quick disclosure This work might be Nietzsche’s least nuanced work, and a lot of the stands he makes in it is a result of his declining health.
